texto: Many people who could not give their best because they were denied the opportunity. We must harness the capabilities of each person to encourage organizational success.” Ramesh Lohia and Pavan Lohia, Consultants, iSixSigmaKaizenPublished in Quality Quotes, Jun 7, 2016, Knowledge Center, ASQ [ AMERICAN SOCIETY FOR QUALITY]
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ramesh Lohia and Pavan Lohia sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Many people who could not give their best because they were denied the opportunity. We must harne…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, capabilities, encourage, útil em momentos de encourage e harness.
